backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point for the Internet Computer canister.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two completed features: changing hero section background to blue and adding a steam iron image, both targeting HeroSection.tsx with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing a Coimbatore laundry service website with hero section, services, testimonials, gallery, and contact sections using warm earth tones and blue accents.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system tokens for light and dark themes, including custom CSS variables for design system colors, borders, and shadows.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO meta tags for Coimbatore steam ironing services and Google Fonts preconnect links for Playfair Display and Inter fonts.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component composing the full single-page layout with header, footer, and seven content sections (Hero, Services, Why Choose Us, How It Works, Testimonials, Gallery, Contact).
frontend/src/components/BrandMark.tsx: Reusable brand component displaying a 3D block-style logo image with tagline text, accepting optional className prop for styling flexibility.
frontend/src/components/sections/Contact: Contact section displaying business information cards (phone, WhatsApp, location, hours) with icons and a prominent CTA panel encouraging customer contact.
frontend/src/components/sections/Gallery: Responsive gallery grid displaying eight laundry service images with hover zoom effects, rounded corners, and shadow transitions in a 3-column layout.
frontend/src/components/sections/HeroSec: Hero section component with background image, blue gradient overlay, headline, trust indicators, and CTA buttons for phone and WhatsApp contact.
frontend/src/components/sections/HowItWo: Displays a 4-step process grid explaining the service workflow from drop-off to collection.
frontend/src/components/sections/Service: Grid layout showcasing 5 services (steam ironing, dry cleaning, stain removal, darning, saree pleating) with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/sections/Testimo: Displays 3 customer testimonials in a card grid layout with quote icons.
frontend/src/components/sections/WhyChoo: Grid of 6 benefit cards highlighting fabric-safe process, saree expertise, transparent pricing, local trust, quick turnaround, and attention to detail.
frontend/src/components/SiteFooter.tsx: Footer component with BrandMark, quick navigation links with smooth scrolling, social media icons, and caffeine.ai attribution with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/SiteHeader.tsx: Sticky header with BrandMark, responsive desktop/mobile navigation with smooth scroll behavior, scroll-based background transitions, and mobile menu toggle.
frontend/src/content/siteContent.ts: Centralized content configuration file containing business info, hero content, services, benefits, process steps, and testimonials data.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor with authentication support, invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color palette (terracotta primary, sage green accent), utility classes for sections, shadows, and float animation.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point wrapping the app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider for state management and authentication.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom color schemes using OKLCH color space, typography plugins, container queries, animations, and custom theme extensions including fonts (Playfair Display, Inter) and shadows.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file documenting a landing page with blue hero background and steam iron image, including two completed features and two pending feature requests for the same changes.
